summary: Completed comprehensive Phase 3.1 end-to-end testing of new match list/detail UI and monthly fee exposure features. Backend APIs tested with 100% success rate (24/24 tests passed including new unauthorized access test). Frontend UI tested with full user flows for matches list, match detail with progressive disclosure, dashboard monthly fee card, and unauthorized access protection.
passed_tests: Backend: All 24 tests from iteration 1 passed (100% success rate)
Backend: New unauthorized match access test (Hotel C gets 403 when accessing match between Hotel A & B)
Backend: GET /api/matches returns list of matches for authorized hotel
Backend: GET /api/matches/{id} returns match detail with progressive disclosure (counterparty info)
Backend: GET /api/matches/{id} returns 403 for unauthorized hotel (not party to match)
Backend: Match fee amount correctly set to 250.0 TL (MATCH_FEE_TL env var)
Frontend: Navigation link 'Eşleşmeler' (data-testid=nav-matches) visible and routes to /matches
Frontend: Matches list table (data-testid=matches-table) displays all matches
Frontend: Table columns show reference_code, accepted_at (formatted), fee_amount (250 TL), fee_status (due)
Frontend: Detail link (data-testid=match-detail-link) navigates to /matches/:id
Frontend: Match detail page shows reference code card (data-testid=match-reference)
Frontend: Match detail page shows fee info card (data-testid=match-fee) with 250 TL
Frontend: Match detail page shows counterparty card (data-testid=match-counterparty) with full hotel details
Frontend: Progressive disclosure working - counterparty shows name, region, concept, address, phone, whatsapp, website, contact_person
Frontend: B2B note (data-testid=match-note) clearly states 'otel → otel kapasite paylaşımı' and 'B2B eşleşme'
Frontend: Dashboard monthly fee card (data-testid=kpi-monthly-fee) aggregates current month matches
Frontend: Monthly fee card displays format '{N} eşleşme / {M} TL' (e.g., '1 eşleşme / 250 TL')
Frontend: Monthly fee calculation correct (counts matches where accepted_at is in current month)
Frontend: Unauthorized access - Hotel C cannot access match detail for match between Hotel A & B
Frontend: Error message (data-testid=match-error) shown: 'Bu eşleşme görüntülenemiyor veya yetkiniz yok.'
Frontend: Counterparty details NOT leaked on unauthorized access (card not rendered)
Frontend: All data-testid attributes present and working correctly
